name: caveman-stats
tagline: Displays real Claude Code session token usage and caveman-mode savings, computed by a hook rather than the model.
verdict: Minimal, honest delegation to a deterministic hook (hooks/caveman-stats.js) rather than model estimation — a strong design for numeric accuracy. No security, network, or destructive concerns; read-only by nature. Only gap: no version field or changelog to signal when the skill last changed.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
